service.description: List enum options for frontend dropdowns using fallback-friendly labels.

set.from: (enumList ?: []).collect { item -> [enumId: item.enumId, enumCode: item.enumCode, description: item.description, sequenceNum: item.sequenceNum, label: darpan.facade.common.FacadeSupport.enumLabel(item)] }

service.description: Get LLM provider settings with stored-secret indicators.
Save LLM provider settings while preserving existing key when blank.

set.from: darpan.facade.settings.LlmSettingsSupport.buildSavePayload(ec, llmProvider, llmApiKey, llmModel, llmBaseUrl, llmTimeoutSeconds, llmEnabled)

service.description: List SFTP server configs with secret redaction indicators.

set.from: (activeTenantUserGroupId ? sftpServerFinder.condition('companyUserGroupId', activeTenantUserGroupId).list() : []).collect { item -> [sftpServerId: item.sftpServerId, description: item.description, companyUserGroupId: item.companyUserGroupId, companyLabel: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.resolveTenantLabelForUserGroupId(ec, item.companyUserGroupId), host: item.host, port: item.port, username: item.username, remoteAttributes: item.remoteAttributes ?: 'Y', hasPassword: item.password ? true : false, hasPrivateKey: item.privateKey ? true : false] }
searchLower ? rows.findAll { row -> [row.sftpServerId, row.description, row.host, row.username].any { it?.toString()?.toLowerCase()?.contains(searchLower) } } : rows
[pageIndex: pageIndexSafe, pageSize: pageSizeSafe, totalCount: totalCount, pageCount: Math.max(1, ((totalCount + pageSizeSafe - 1) / pageSizeSafe) as int)]

service.description: Create or update an SFTP server configuration.

if.message: Username is required for SFTP access.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, existingServer, "SFTP server '${sftpServerIdValue}' was not found.", "SFTP server '${sftpServerIdValue}' is not available in your active tenant.")
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for SFTP settings.')

[sftpServerId: sftpServerIdValue, description: descriptionValue, companyUserGroupId: existingServer?.companyUserGroupId, createdByUserId: existingServer?.createdByUserId, host: hostValue, port: portValue, username: usernameValue, remoteAttributes: remoteAttributesValue, password: passwordValue ?: existingServer?.password, privateKey: privateKeyValue ?: existingServer?.privateKey]

[sftpServerId: sftpServerIdValue, description: descriptionValue, host: hostValue, port: portValue, username: usernameValue, remoteAttributes: remoteAttributesValue, hasPassword: !!darpan.facade.common.FacadeSupport.normalize(serverMap.password), hasPrivateKey: !!darpan.facade.common.FacadeSupport.normalize(serverMap.privateKey)]

if.message: Saved server without credentials. Add password or key before running automation.

service.description: List NetSuite auth configurations with secret indicators.

set.from: (activeTenantUserGroupId ? nsAuthConfigFinder.condition('companyUserGroupId', activeTenantUserGroupId).list() : []).collect { item -> [nsAuthConfigId: item.nsAuthConfigId, description: item.description, companyUserGroupId: item.companyUserGroupId, companyLabel: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.resolveTenantLabelForUserGroupId(ec, item.companyUserGroupId), authType: item.authType ?: 'NONE', username: item.username, tokenUrl: item.tokenUrl, clientId: item.clientId, certId: item.certId, scope: item.scope ?: 'restlets rest_webservices', isActive: item.isActive ?: 'Y', hasPassword: item.password ? true : false, hasApiToken: item.apiToken ? true : false, hasPrivateKeyPem: item.privateKeyPem ? true : false] }
searchLower ? rows.findAll { row -> [row.nsAuthConfigId, row.description, row.authType, row.username].any { it?.toString()?.toLowerCase()?.contains(searchLower) } } : rows
[pageIndex: pageIndexSafe, pageSize: pageSizeSafe, totalCount: totalCount, pageCount: Math.max(1, ((totalCount + pageSizeSafe - 1) / pageSizeSafe) as int)]

service.description: Create or update a NetSuite auth configuration.

if.message: Auth Type must be NONE, BASIC, BEARER, or OAUTH2_M2M_JWT.
Username is required for BASIC auth.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, existingAuth, "NS Auth config '${nsAuthConfigIdValue}' was not found.", "NS Auth config '${nsAuthConfigIdValue}' is not available in your active tenant.")
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for NetSuite auth settings.')

if.message: Token URL is required for OAUTH2_M2M_JWT auth.
Client ID is required for OAUTH2_M2M_JWT auth.
Cert ID is required for OAUTH2_M2M_JWT auth.
Private Key PEM is required for OAUTH2_M2M_JWT auth.
Provide API Token (or password fallback) for BEARER auth.

set.from: [nsAuthConfigId: nsAuthConfigIdValue, description: nsAuthDescriptionValue, companyUserGroupId: existingAuth?.companyUserGroupId, createdByUserId: existingAuth?.createdByUserId, authType: nsAuthTypeValue, username: nsUsernameValue, tokenUrl: nsTokenUrlValue, clientId: nsClientIdValue, certId: nsCertIdValue, scope: nsScopeValue, isActive: nsIsActiveValue, password: nsPasswordValue ?: existingAuth?.password, apiToken: nsApiTokenValue ?: existingAuth?.apiToken, privateKeyPem: nsPrivateKeyPemValue ?: existingAuth?.privateKeyPem]

[nsAuthConfigId: nsAuthConfigIdValue, description: nsAuthDescriptionValue, authType: nsAuthTypeValue, username: nsUsernameValue, tokenUrl: nsTokenUrlValue, clientId: nsClientIdValue, certId: nsCertIdValue, scope: nsScopeValue, isActive: nsIsActiveValue, hasPassword: !!darpan.facade.common.FacadeSupport.normalize(authMap.password), hasApiToken: !!darpan.facade.common.FacadeSupport.normalize(authMap.apiToken), hasPrivateKeyPem: !!darpan.facade.common.FacadeSupport.normalize(authMap.privateKeyPem)]

service.description: List NetSuite endpoint configs joined with auth metadata.

set.from: (authConfigList ?: []).collectEntries { item -> [(item.nsAuthConfigId): [description: item.description, authType: item.authType, isActive: item.isActive ?: 'Y']] }

(nsRestletConfigList ?: []).collect { item -> def authMeta = authById[item.nsAuthConfigId]; [nsRestletConfigId: item.nsRestletConfigId, description: item.description, companyUserGroupId: item.companyUserGroupId, companyLabel: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.resolveTenantLabelForUserGroupId(ec, item.companyUserGroupId), endpointUrl: item.endpointUrl, httpMethod: item.httpMethod ?: 'POST', nsAuthConfigId: item.nsAuthConfigId, authDescription: authMeta?.description, authType: authMeta?.authType, authIsActive: authMeta?.isActive ?: 'Y', headersJson: item.headersJson, connectTimeoutSeconds: item.connectTimeoutSeconds ?: 30, readTimeoutSeconds: item.readTimeoutSeconds ?: 60, isActive: item.isActive ?: 'Y'] }
searchLower ? rows.findAll { row -> [row.nsRestletConfigId, row.description, row.endpointUrl, row.nsAuthConfigId, row.authType].any { it?.toString()?.toLowerCase()?.contains(searchLower) } } : rows
[pageIndex: pageIndexSafe, pageSize: pageSizeSafe, totalCount: totalCount, pageCount: Math.max(1, ((totalCount + pageSizeSafe - 1) / pageSizeSafe) as int)]

service.description: Create or update a NetSuite endpoint configuration bound to an auth config.

if.message: HTTP Method must be POST, PUT, or GET.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, existingEndpoint, "NS endpoint config '${nsRestletConfigIdValue}' was not found.", "NS endpoint config '${nsRestletConfigIdValue}' is not available in your active tenant.")

darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, authCfg, "NsAuthConfig ${nsAuthConfigIdValue} not found.", "NsAuthConfig ${nsAuthConfigIdValue} is not available in your active tenant.")
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for NetSuite endpoint settings.')

[nsRestletConfigId: nsRestletConfigIdValue, description: nsDescriptionValue, companyUserGroupId: existingEndpoint?.companyUserGroupId ?: authCfg?.companyUserGroupId, createdByUserId: existingEndpoint?.createdByUserId, endpointUrl: nsEndpointUrlValue, httpMethod: nsHttpMethodValue, nsAuthConfigId: nsAuthConfigIdValue, headersJson: nsHeadersJsonValue, connectTimeoutSeconds: nsConnectTimeoutValue, readTimeoutSeconds: nsReadTimeoutValue, isActive: nsIsActiveValue, authType: null, username: null, password: null, apiToken: null, tokenUrl: null, clientId: null, certId: null, privateKeyPem: null, scope: null]

[nsRestletConfigId: nsRestletConfigIdValue, description: nsDescriptionValue, endpointUrl: nsEndpointUrlValue, httpMethod: nsHttpMethodValue, nsAuthConfigId: nsAuthConfigIdValue, headersJson: nsHeadersJsonValue, connectTimeoutSeconds: nsConnectTimeoutValue, readTimeoutSeconds: nsReadTimeoutValue, isActive: nsIsActiveValue]

service.description: List external Read DB settings with redacted secret indicators.

set.from: (hcReadDbConfigList ?: []).collect { item -> [hcReadDbConfigId: item.hcReadDbConfigId, displayName: item.displayName ?: item.description, host: item.host, port: item.port ?: 3306, databaseName: item.databaseName, additionalParameters: item.additionalParameters, jdbcUrl: item.jdbcUrl?.toString()?.replaceAll('(?i)(password=)[^&;]+', '$1***'), username: item.username, dbDriver: item.dbDriver ?: 'com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver', defaultTableName: item.defaultTableName ?: 'inventory_item_detail', itemIdColumn: item.itemIdColumn ?: 'product_id', locationIdColumn: item.locationIdColumn ?: 'facility_id', transactionDateColumn: item.transactionDateColumn ?: 'effective_date', connectionPropertiesJson: item.connectionPropertiesJson, isActive: item.isActive ?: 'Y', hasPassword: item.password ? true : false] }
searchLower ? rows.findAll { row -> [row.hcReadDbConfigId, row.displayName, row.host, row.databaseName, row.username].any { it?.toString()?.toLowerCase()?.contains(searchLower) } } : rows
[pageIndex: pageIndexSafe, pageSize: pageSizeSafe, totalCount: totalCount, pageCount: Math.max(1, ((totalCount + pageSizeSafe - 1) / pageSizeSafe) as int)]

service.description: Create or update Read DB config; auto-generates config ID/JDBC URL when needed.

set.from: [hcReadDbConfigId: resolvedConfigId, description: displayNameValue, displayName: displayNameValue, host: hostValue, port: portValue, databaseName: databaseNameValue, additionalParameters: cleanAdditionalValue, jdbcUrl: jdbcUrlValue, username: usernameValue, dbDriver: dbDriverValue, defaultTableName: defaultTableNameValue, itemIdColumn: itemIdColumnValue, locationIdColumn: locationIdColumnValue, transactionDateColumn: transactionDateColumnValue, connectionPropertiesJson: connectionPropertiesJsonValue, isActive: isActiveValue, password: passwordValue ?: existingConfig?.password]

[hcReadDbConfigId: resolvedConfigId, displayName: displayNameValue, host: hostValue, port: portValue, databaseName: databaseNameValue, additionalParameters: cleanAdditionalValue, jdbcUrl: jdbcUrlValue, username: usernameValue, dbDriver: dbDriverValue, defaultTableName: defaultTableNameValue, itemIdColumn: itemIdColumnValue, locationIdColumn: locationIdColumnValue, transactionDateColumn: transactionDateColumnValue, connectionPropertiesJson: connectionPropertiesJsonValue, isActive: isActiveValue, hasPassword: !!darpan.facade.common.FacadeSupport.normalize(hcMap.password)]
